title: Purple loading screen - ArcT1k0
description: This project changes the minecraft vanilla loading screen into a more lively purple
body:
Hello this resource pack NEEDS the mod Puzzles: The way to install this mod is go into the mod section of modninth or your launcher and search up puzzles then get the version u intend to use or play on then launch ur game once it is installed.

This resource pack is dependant on it and Will NOT work without Puzzles. Thank you for reading and downloading htis pack if you choose to

If you have anyenquiries make a ticket in my discord and if you would like a pack made also do the same thing!

# Made by ArcT1k0
